title: Remove excellence/digital learning sections from About and add Payment Requests to Customize tab

requirements.text: In the About Indo Kidz section on the Homepage, remove the '9 years of excellence' content block entirely. Do not modify any other section or content on the page.

quotes: remove the section where it is written 9 years of excellence

acceptanceCriteria: The '9 years of excellence' text/block is no longer visible on the Homepage in the About Indo Kidz section
All other sections and content on the Homepage remain unchanged

requirements.text: In the About Indo Kidz section on the Homepage, remove the 'Smart Class Digital Learning' content block entirely. Do not modify any other section or content on the page.

quotes: remove the smart class digital learning too all this is written in about indo kidz section

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Smart Class Digital Learning' text/block is no longer visible on the Homepage in the About Indo Kidz section
All other sections and content on the Homepage remain unchanged

requirements.text: Add a 'Payment Requests' tab/column inside the Admin Panel's Customize tab area so that the admin can view all submitted fee payment requests. This view should be accessible only to authenticated admin users, consistent with how the rest of the Customize tab is restricted. The existing Customize tab and all its current contents must remain fully intact and unchanged.

quotes: add a column in customize tab where the admin can see the payment request
the customize tab still should be visible to admin only

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Payment Requests' section/column appears within or alongside the Customize tab in the Admin Panel
The section displays submitted payment requests (student name, fee category, payment mode, submission time) fetched from the backend
The Payment Requests section is visible only to authenticated admin users — non-admin users cannot access it
The existing Customize tab content (theme customizer, color presets, font choice) remains fully functional and unchanged
Admin access control logic is not modified

constraints: Do not change any admin access control logic or admin detection mechanism
Do not alter any other section of the Homepage beyond removing the two specified blocks
The Customize tab must remain admin-only as before
Do not change any other tabs or sections in the Admin Panel
nonGoals: Redesigning the About Indo Kidz section layout
Modifying the fee payment submission form on the public FeesPayment page
Adding payment processing or status-update functionality
Changing the admin panel's tab structure beyond adding the Payment Requests view
